package.name: duburi_sensors
package.description: Sensor-only helper library for duburi_control. Provides a uniform YawSource interface with two implementations (MAVLink AHRS and BNO085 over USB CDC, with one-shot Pixhawk-mag offset calibration), DVL/WitMotion stubs for future Phase 4 work, and a standalone ROS2 diagnostic node. No fusion, no vision.
